granted_abilities.name: Defenses Up
granted_abilities.text: This model receives +1 to its Df and Wp.

granted_abilities.name: "The Fun's Over?"
granted_abilities.text: When this model activates, remove a Remains marker within 6". If it cannot, discard this upgrade.

granted_actions.name: Furious Rush
granted_actions.effects: Move this model up to its Sp toward an enemy model in LoS. Then, this model may declare a (melee) action.
